reviews.comment:
Cargue gasoil infinita y la camioneta parece chimenea. Humo negro. Para mí está adulterdo

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with diesel and the truck is like a chimney. Black smoke. I think it's been tampered with.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Juan José, lamentamos lo ocurrido. Es la primera vez que recibimos un comentario de estas características, de algún usuario.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuLThxYldREAE

reviews.comment:
Consumi un cafe y un tostado y me cobraron casi 12mil pesos cuando en Sierra de la ventana lo mismo me sale 6700pesos

(Translated by Google)
I had a coffee and a toasted sandwich and they charged me almost 12,000 pesos, when the same thing costs me 6,700 pesos in Sierra de la Ventana.

reviews.comment:
Es la única ypf full que cierra su cocina a las 22 hs. Nunca tiene disponibilidad de comida.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF Full station that closes its kitchen at 10 PM. It never has food available.

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atención del full. Imposible trabajar con música a todo volumen. Sirvieron un café sin el platito de la taza, de mala gana.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible customer service. Impossible to work with loud music. They reluctantly served coffee without a saucer.
